V-006.notes: Multiple world model papers: CausalVAE, Event-Centric World Modeling, WorldMAP, One Life to Learn, Memory-Aided World Models, MotionScape.

V-007.notes: EgoVerse egocentric human dataset, ActiveGlasses ego-centric demonstration, RoSHI human data suit, HEX human-aligned experts.

V-010.notes: UniLACT depth-aware RGB latent action, BLaDA 3DGS fields, DP-DeGauss 4D scene reconstruction, 3D Gaussian papers.
